open_questions: unit_00946: Acrobatics maneuver text is truncated mid-sentence; full DC/task set for stunts not available in this chunk.
unit_01144: Perception chunk lists only the heading 'Awareness' with no mechanical rule.
unit_01307: Introductory narrative on advantages does not add a distinct spine mechanism beyond existing Advantage / check modifiers.
unit_01944: Trapping with Create cuts off mid-rule (attack + Dodge resistance incomplete).
unit_01997: Material Toughness lists substance names without numeric rank values in this excerpt; mapping to Toughness ranks needs adjacent handbook text.
unit_00925: Deluxe skill name list overlaps batch_0 SkillCatalog (unit_00029); confirm single canonical catalog vs. edition variants.
unit_01032: Player advice on 'utility skills' is guidance only, not a distinct mechanical object.
cross_cutting_notes: Batch 1 ties Skills to Checks via DCs, opposed rolls, and circumstance modifiers; powers reference attack checks, effect checks, and resistance checks; damage and material toughness link Combat resolution to ranked measurements. Advantages and power extras/flaws modify effective cost and resolution of checks in play.

concept.name: AthleticsJumpDistanceFromCheck
concept.owns: Owns converting an Athletics check result into jump distance in feet, with divisors for standing, vertical, and standing-vertical jumps, and routine distance from (Athletics bonus + 10).

concept.name: PrecariousSurfaceMovementCheck
concept.owns: Owns moving along a precarious surface at ground speed minus 1 rank after a successful Acrobatics check vs. surface DC, with degrees of failure costing movement or causing a fall.

concept.name: InteractionTargetMentalThreshold
concept.owns: Owns circumstance penalties and outright prohibition when using interaction skills on subjects by Intellect rank (–5 at Int –5, unusable if missing mental abilities) and awareness/understanding requirements.

concept.name: SkillCheckModifierSources
concept.owns: Owns that miscellaneous modifiers from circumstances, advantages, and powers stack toward meeting or beating a DC (often based on another character's traits).

concept.name: AcrobaticsTaskMenu
concept.owns: Owns named Acrobatics applications (lessen fall damage per degree, acrobatic maneuver, prone-to-stand free action, contort through tight space) as task labels for checks.

concept.name: ClimbCircumstanceModifierTable
concept.owns: Owns listed circumstance modifiers for climbing (bracing, corner, short climb, slipperiness, speed bonus, vulnerability while climbing).

concept.name: DeceptionBelievabilityDCAdjustment
concept.owns: Owns DC shifts for Deception based on target willingness and how believable or risky the deception is (–5 to +20 per listed factors).

concept.name: InteractionSkill
concept.owns: Owns social interaction skills aimed at influencing others, requiring subjects to be aware and able to understand the user, with stronger use on sufficiently intelligent subjects.

concept.name: CloseCombatSkillSpecialization
concept.owns: Owns separate Close Combat skills per specific close attack (weapon or power), granting attack check bonus equal to skill rank, with scope limits (e.g. not all unarmed maneuvers).

concept.name: ExpertiseRoutineAndPlayerBoundary
concept.owns: Owns using Expertise checks or routine (bonus + 10) to bound what the character knows versus player knowledge; GM may allow hero-point 'hunch' exceptions.

concept.name: CovertMessageSkillExchange
concept.owns: Owns Deception (innuendo) DCs for covert messages and recipient Insight against the same DC to understand; Insight also used to detect hidden Deception messages.

concept.name: InsightVersusIllusion
concept.owns: Owns secret Insight check (DC 10 + Illusion rank) to notice flaws in an illusion, revealing it as unreal.

concept.name: IntimidationDemoralize
concept.owns: Owns standard-action Intimidation in combat to impose impaired (–2 checks) or, with four+ degrees of success, disabled (–5 checks) until end of aggressor's next round.

concept.name: InvestigationVersusPerceptionSearch
concept.owns: Owns that Perception notices immediately while Investigation finds clues, traps, and details with effort when searching an area.

concept.name: ForensicEvidenceAnalysisCheck
concept.owns: Owns Investigation check (base DC 15, time and disturbance modifiers) to extract information from existing evidence; two+ degrees of failure may mislead at GM discretion.

concept.name: VisualPerceptionVisibilityDC
concept.owns: Owns baseline DCs for spotting something by sight (plain sight 0, subtle 5–10+), opposed Stealth, and ties to disguise and concealed objects per linked skills.

concept.name: PersuasionAttitudeShift
concept.owns: Owns attitude track (hostile through helpful), standard-action persuasion, limits during conflict, repeated attempts against initial attitude, and degree-based shifts with example.

concept.name: SleightOfHandContortionAndObservation
concept.owns: Owns DC 30 contortion through tight openings and minor legerdemain (DC 10) opposed by observer Perception when watched.

concept.name: StealthTailingProcedure
concept.owns: Owns tailing at normal speed with cover, Perception checks on course changes or once if unsuspecting, and Deception vs Insight to pass off being noticed.

concept.name: JuryRiggedRepairCheck
concept.owns: Owns temporary Technology repair with total –10 DC adjustment, standard-action check, single problem fixed, lasting until scene end, then requiring full repair before re-jury-rigging.

concept.name: TechnologyInventingPrerequisite
concept.owns: Owns using Technology to create inventions when the character has the Inventor advantage, deferring full rules to the Inventing section.

concept.name: SecurityOrTrapDCLadder
concept.owns: Owns escalating DC rungs (10 through 40+5) for bypassing security/traps, with failure doing nothing and multiple degrees of failure triggering alarms or traps when possible.

concept.name: TreatmentDiagnosisAndAilmentAssist
concept.owns: Owns minute-long diagnosis granting +2 circumstance on later Treatment checks at GM discretion, and Treatment checks each resistance attempt against disease/poison to grant +2 or +5 to the patient's resistance on degrees of success.

concept.name: AdvantageNameGroupings
concept.owns: Owns exemplar groupings of advantage names (general and skill-related lists) as handbook index material for character building.

concept.name: AdvantageRankAndDescriptionPattern
concept.owns: Owns that advantages are listed with name, type, optional ranks, and text describing benefits including extra rank effects and comparisons to characters without the advantage.

concept.name: FightingStyleAdvantageBundleExamples
concept.owns: Owns sample combinations of advantages illustrating martial fighting styles (boxing, judo, kung fu, sword-fighting, wrestling) including optional Close Attack ranks.

concept.name: UltimateEffortFixedResult
concept.owns: Owns spending a hero point to treat a check result as 20 for Ultimate Aim (next round's aimed attack check), Ultimate Resistance (one chosen defense), or Ultimate Skill (one skill).

concept.name: PowerEffectStandardCostPerRank
concept.owns: Owns that each power effect is bought in ranks like other traits, with greater rank meaning greater effect, and each effect has a standard cost per rank.

concept.name: SeriesRequiredDescriptorRule
concept.owns: Owns GM-mandated descriptors (e.g. mutant, psychic) applying to all powers in a series unless justified otherwise, with possible Benefit or complications for exceptions.

concept.name: PowerEffectType
concept.owns: Owns categorization of power effects into types that share rules and provide descriptors for interactions with other effects.

concept.name: DefensePowerEffectPattern
concept.owns: Owns that defense effects typically grant resistance bonuses or immunity, often personal, subtle, permanent, or free-action sustained with on/off vulnerability.

concept.name: PowerActivationAndResolution
concept.owns: Owns that some effects work automatically while others require effort such as attack or effect checks, and effects on others allow resistance checks unless waived.

concept.name: PowerEffectNameTableFragment
concept.owns: Owns partial alphabetical index rows of power effect names as handbook fragments (two consecutive table chunks).

concept.name: EffectResistanceWaiverRules
concept.owns: Owns voluntary waiver of resistance except Toughness; optional discontinuation of sustained/continuous Toughness bonuses; Immunity skipping checks; Instant duration definition start.

concept.name: PowerEffectSummaryLine
concept.owns: Owns the standard one-line presentation of Action, Range, Duration, and Cost for an effect block.

concept.name: PowerExtraSection
concept.owns: Owns the extras subsection listing optional modifiers for an effect, including effect-unique extras highlighted in handbook layout.

concept.name: SamplePowerWriteupSchema
concept.owns: Owns the fields for sample powers: name, listed effect(s) with modifiers, and cost (per rank, flat, or hybrid).

concept.name: AlternateFormDescriptorPackages
concept.owns: Owns example alternate forms (energy, gaseous, ghost, heroic, liquid, particulate, shadow, solid, swarm, two-dimensional) expressed as bundled suggested effects and modifiers.

concept.name: BlastRangedDamageEffect
concept.owns: Owns the Blast sample: ranged Damage at 2 points per rank, ranged attack vs Dodge, damage equal to rank, Toughness resistance, with optional descriptor narrowing flaw text.

concept.name: CommunicationLimitedFlaw
concept.owns: Owns Limited flaw examples for Communication (audience group restriction; Communication-Dependent carrier for other perception-range effects) with –1 cost per rank where applicable.

concept.name: PerceptionRangeTargetingAndConcealment
concept.owns: Owns that perception-range effects need accurate perception of the target (total concealment blocks), optional acute-sense Perception check to locate, and +5 resistance if concealed.

concept.name: ConcealmentEffectExtras
concept.owns: Owns extras for Concealment (Affects Others, Area, Attack, Precise) with stated point or per-rank costs and interaction rules.

concept.name: CreateEffectExtras
concept.owns: Owns extras for Create (Continuous, Impervious, Innate, Movable, Precise, Selective) with cost notes and object behavior implications.

concept.name: DamageResistanceDegreeOutcomes
concept.owns: Owns Toughness resistance vs (damage rank + 15) with degrees mapping to cumulative –1 circumstance, dazed, staggered, incapacitated, and repeated stagger leading to fourth-degree effect.

concept.name: MaterialToughnessOrdinalScale
concept.owns: Owns ordered material names for Toughness comparisons (paper through super-alloys) as a rank-ordered scale pending numeric rank binding from adjacent rules.

concept.name: EnhancedTraitLimitedAndPermanent
concept.owns: Owns Limited flaw patterns and Permanent modifier behavior for Enhanced Trait (always on, no extra effort stunts, complication for rare limits).
